query:
SELECT titulo, clienteId, COUNT(*) as qtd, GROUP_CONCAT(id ORDER BY id) as ids
FROM documentos 
GROUP BY titulo, clienteId 
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 
ORDER BY qtd DESC 
LIMIT 20;
